hero.title: Iiprojekthi zokufikeleleka koluntu
hero.lead: Olu luhlu luluhlu lweeprojekthi zoluntu ezigcinwe nge-IATF. Iiprojethi zokufikeleleka ezamkelweyo, iziseko zendawo, kunye neeprototypes ezigciniweyo zigcinwa zibonakala apha.

intro: Iiprojekthi ezamkelweyo zidweliswe apha emva kokuba zipapashiwe.

header.title: Ukuguqula imfuno engqalileyo yokufikeleleka ibe yiprojekthi yoluntu

paragraphs: I-IATF ihlola iimfuno ezibonakalayo zokufikeleleka ezinokuthi ziguqulwe zibe ngumsebenzi woluntu oluncedo womthombo ovulekileyo.

emptyState.title: Azikho iiprojekthi ezipapashiweyo okwangoku
paragraphs: I-IATF ilungiselela iseti yayo yokuqala yeeprojekthi zoluntu.
Usenako ukuthumela isicelo ukuba unemfuno engqalileyo yokufikeleleka.
